scope: AgenC NotebookEdit model-facing tool port, read-before-edit guard, notebook cell mutation semantics, permission flow, and registry surface.

requiredBehaviors: NotebookEdit is named NotebookEdit and remains deferred from the default visible tool catalog
notebook_path and new_source are required
only .ipynb notebook paths are accepted
missing notebook files are rejected instead of being created
edit_mode is limited to replace, insert, and delete
insert mode requires an explicit cell_type
edgeCases: direct headless invocations without a session id keep existing compatibility for tests and embedded callers
workspace-relative paths are resolved through the same allowed-root and canonicalization path as NotebookRead
raw notebook source text is preserved exactly when assigning new_source

requiredBehaviors: session-backed notebook edits require a prior NotebookRead or equivalent full session read
partial NotebookRead snapshots do not authorize NotebookEdit
the read-before-edit guard uses the canonical path key recorded by NotebookRead
a notebook changed after the recorded read is rejected with the source-compatible modified-since-read message
successful edits record a fresh full snapshot with post-write notebook bytes
edgeCases: unread session-backed edits leave the notebook unchanged
partial-read rejections leave the notebook unchanged
stale-read rejections leave the externally changed notebook unchanged

requiredBehaviors: replace and delete require a cell_id
cell_id resolves by exact notebook cell id before falling back to cell-N numeric indexes
insert without a cell_id inserts at the beginning of the notebook
insert with a cell_id inserts after the addressed cell
delete removes the addressed cell
replace resets execution_count and outputs for code cells before optional cell_type changes
inserted code cells receive execution_count null and empty outputs
edgeCases: out-of-range cell-N ids report the source-compatible missing-index message
unknown nonnumeric cell ids report the source-compatible missing-id message
generated notebook cell ids avoid collisions with existing cell ids

requiredBehaviors: NotebookEdit requires approval by default
NotebookEdit remains side-effecting for recovery classification
checkPermissions delegates to the same write-path permission validation as Write
allowed decisions preserve the notebook_path while exposing the validated file_path
outside-working-root paths produce ask decisions before mutation
edgeCases: permission-denied paths do not mutate notebook files
write permission suggestions are reused from the shared path-validation layer

requiredBehaviors: NotebookEdit is registered through the model-facing bootstrap tool surface
NotebookEdit remains deferred until discovery
NotebookEdit raw string dispatch maps the string to notebook_path
the registry evidence includes NotebookEdit in runtime/src/tool-registry.ts
edgeCases: raw string dispatch still fails cleanly when new_source is omitted
NotebookRead raw string dispatch remains unchanged
